topic: Why do some perfumes last all day while others disappear in one hour?

domain_concepts: Volatility profiles of fragrance raw materials including essential oils, aroma chemicals, and fixatives
Molecular weight impact on evaporation rates influencing top, heart, and base note persistence
Role of solvent systems and alcohol concentration in fragrance diffusion and longevity
Accord composition strategies balancing hydrophobic and hydrophilic ingredients for sustained release
Maceration and aging processes enhancing molecular integration and scent stability
Use of fixatives such as benzoin, musk compounds, and resins to slow evaporation and increase tenacity
Influence of skin chemistry, pH, and sebum production on perfume absorption and scent projection
Techniques in fragrance layering and concentration formats (eau de toilette vs. parfum) affecting lasting power
Application methods and impact of environmental factors like temperature and humidity on perfume degradation
